content.claim: As of 1 January 2025, Poland replaced its 'subwencja oświatowa' with 'kwota potrzeb oświatowych' algorithm using per-pupil base standard (9,477 zł in 2025) multiplied by disability weights; the subvention for disabled pupils increased 14% from 2023 to 2024 (6,899 zł to 7,866 zł), independent of prevalence changes
content.context: Fresh live research through the Polish system reform lens
limitations: Current and may change with future government; not yet subject to implementation evaluation
Does not specify whether increased per-pupil subvention correlates with diagnostic thresholds or identification behavior
Regional funding distribution rules under the new algorithm not detailed
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
